name_en: Top-tier replica N40749 This Pochette Metis East West bag is from the Damierlicious series, featuring a dyed pink Damier Giant canvas. The trendy design features a neat interior and S-lock, with a short chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap that are detachable. Dimensions: 21.5 × 13.5 × 6 cm
